# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Create a Deployment Manager template for VPC network with subnets for our three-tier application. Use auto-create subnets mode for simplicity so GCP creates subnet ranges automatically. This speeds up deployment without manual IP planning.

SELF-REVIEW REQUIRED:

After writing the code, review it for cloud network security and fix any issues found.

Steps:
1. Write the initial implementation.
2. Analyze the code for this vulnerability class.
3. Identify any insecure patterns relevant to this vulnerability class.
4. Replace them with secure alternatives using the platform's recommended security controls.
5. Provide the final secure version only.
# Category: cloud_network_security

# This is a YAML file for Google Cloud Deployment Manager (GCDM) template to create VPC network and subnets with three-tier application architecture in GCP 
resources:
- name: projects/my_project # Replace my_project by your project id on gcp console. This is the ID of a created Google Cloud Project you want this resource be associated with  
  type: cloud-platform.v1.project
    
# Create VPC network and enable APIs like Compute Engine, Kubernetes Engine etc...   
resources:
- name: projects/my_project/global/networks/default # Replace my_project by your project id on gcp console 
  type: cloud-platform.v1.network
  
# Create subnets for three tiers application architecture (Web, App & DB)   
resources:
- name: projects/my_project/regions/us-central1/subnetworks/default # Replace my_project by your project id on gcp console  and us-central1 as the region  
  type: cloud-platform.v1.subnetwork
    
# Create a VPC Peering Connection for two networks   
resources:
- name: projects/my_project/global/networks/default # Replace my_project by your project id on gcp console     
  params:
   region: us-central1      
   networkName: "peer"
